description: A retail operations manager needs a heatmap to identify peak shopping days. Using the file 'sales_data.csv' located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv', create a Power BI report named 'Weekday_Heatmap.pbix' on the Desktop. The report must contain a page named 'Heatmap' featuring a Matrix visual and a Card visual. The Matrix should display a 'Total_Sales' measure (summing 'Sales_Amount') by 'Day_Name' (rows) and 'Product_Category' (columns), with background color conditional formatting applied to the values to create a heatmap effect. The 'sales_data' table must include calculated columns for 'Day_Number' and 'Day_Name' derived from 'Sale_Date'. The Card visual should display the 'Total_Sales' measure. Login as 'Docker' (no password required).
